markdown:
#  How do I set up my account in Resource Planning? 
##  Background 
People using Resource Planning can log in to Procore and access the Resource Planning tool.
##  Answer 
Users are invited to Procore and Resource Planning by another user at their company. See [Add People to Resource Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/resource-planning-company/tutorials/add-people-to-resource-planning). Once invited, you will receive an email with instructions to set up your account.
### Create your Account in Procore
  1. From the email, click **Get Started**.
  2. Enter your **Password**. Your password must include the following requirements:
     * Be at least 8 characters
     * Contain at least one upper case character
     * Contain at least one lower case character
     * Contain at least one numeric character
     * Contain at least one of the following special characters `(! @ # $ % ^ & * ( ) - _ = + ` ~ ' " , < . > / ? [ { ] } \ | ; :)`
  3. Re-enter your password to confirm your password.
  4. Click **Set Password**.


### Log in to Resource Planning
  1. Go to <https://app.procore.com> or <https://login.procore.com/>
  2. Enter your **Email** address, and click **Continue.**  
To save your email for next time, check **Remember Email**. For your security, always uncheck this box on a shared computer.
  3. Enter your password, and click **Continue**. 
#####  Tip
**Forgot your password, or has it expired?** Click **Forgot Password?** to create a new one, or learn more by clicking **Trouble logging in to Procore?**
  4. If you have access to more than one company's Procore account, select a company and click **Continue** to log in.


  1. Navigate to the Company level **Resource Planning** tool.
  2. The first time you navigate to the Resource Planning tool, you are asked to 'Authorize Resource Planning'. Click **Allow** to access the Resource Planning tool.  
![Clipboard Ef7b5f832e130f27ac0d526647a2a3176](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f112687a6cb6ebd61fdb042e0f985e5b/e0019b6278545ea91123935f6d4e4a49/clipboard_ef7b5f832e130f27ac0d526647a2a3176.png?fm=webp&h=258)
